announcements.text: Review Of Interest Rates 30 May - PNB's MCLR, repo-linked lending rate and base rate remain unchanged from 1 June 2026.
Annual Report For FY 2025-26 27 May - PNB FY26 annual report shows Rs16,904 crore profit and recommends Rs3 dividend.
Business Responsibility and Sustainability Reporting (BRSR) 27 May - Punjab National Bank published its FY2025-26 BRSR report, covering ESG policies, workforce data, and sustainability targets.
Notice Of The 25Th Annual General Meeting Of The Bank 27 May
